description_long: This is a rustic cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in textured, shingle-like tiles, giving it a weathered stone appearance. The structure sits on a rectangular stone-tiled base, with the front featuring a wooden porch supported by two posts and a visible entryway. The side walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, while the rear wall is solid with no visible openings. The roof extends well beyond the walls, creating deep overhangs on both sides. A single, wide window is visible at the front, set above the porch and beneath the roof's peak. The overall design is simple and functional, evoking a traditional countryside or mountain retreat.
description: A rustic cabin with a gable shingle roof, stone-tiled base, wooden porch, and a single front window. The structure features deep roof overhangs and a solid rear wall.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the side, highlighting the long, shingled gable roof and the stone-tiled base, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_1: The rear of the cabin shows a solid wooden wall beneath the gable roof, with no windows or doors present.
description_view_2: Another side view similar to view 0, showing the extended roof and stone-tiled base, again with no visible openings.
description_view_3: The front of the cabin features a wooden porch, two supporting posts, a centered entryway, and a single window above the porch.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and shingle cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: single large rectangular window centered on the front facade above the porch; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: single door centered on the front facade beneath the porch roof
